full_text:
Fan Chou 樊稠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Chou (樊稠)was born in Jingcheng. Controlled the Han court alongside Li Jue and Guo Si. A brave general, killed by Li Jue. Fan Chou was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Li Jue. Fan Chou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
